auth.login_subtitle: Ingia kupata akili yako ya biashara
auth.register_subtitle: Anza kuchunguza fursa za biashara duniani bure
auth.check_email_desc: Tumetuma kiungo cha uthibitisho kwa {{email}}. Bofya kuwezesha akaunti yako.
auth.password_too_short: Nenosiri lazima iwe na angalau herufi 8

country.full_report_desc: Mipango ya biashara ya AI, modeli za ROI, wasambazaji waliopendekezwa.
country.ai_placeholder: Ni mkakati gani bora wa kuingia?
country.ai_placeholder_country: Uliza chochote kuhusu fursa za biashara katika {{country}}.
country.ai_unavailable: Samahani, Mshauri wa AI haupatikani kwa sasa.
country.see_opportunities_desc: Ripoti ya kina, alama na mipango ya biashara ya AI kwa {{country}}

farming.title: Ugunduzi wa Fursa
farming.subtitle: Eleza bidhaa yako — mshauri wetu wa AI atatambua njia za usambazaji, maeneo na fursa muhimu duniani kote.
farming.product_name_placeholder: mf: Mafuta ya argan ya kikaboni
farming.product_desc_placeholder: Inatumika kwa nini? Inatatua tatizo gani?
farming.opp_desc_placeholder: Masoko gani yanakuvutia? Una vikwazo gani?
farming.geography_placeholder: mf: Afrika Kusini mwa Sahara, Asia ya Kusini-Mashariki
farming.affiliate_helper: Tutaingiza kiungo chako katika mapendekezo yote ya washawishi yaliyoundwa kwa bidhaa hii.
farming.error_product: Tafadhali ingiza jina la bidhaa yako.

pricing.title: Bei rahisi na wazi
pricing.subtitle: Kutoka uchunguzi wa bure hadi mpango kamili wa biashara wa AI. Panda ngazi ukiwa tayari.
pricing.credits_desc: Mshauri wa AI (kuunda mipango ya biashara, ripoti za hatua) hutumia tokeni za AI. Kila kikao hutozwa kupitia kihesabu cha mikopo ya ndani. Mikopo inaweza kujazwa wakati wowote. Salio linapofika {{threshold}}, mwaliko wa kujaza unaonekana moja kwa moja.
pricing.credits_note: Kujaza kunapatikana katika akaunti yako. Imejumuishwa katika mpango wa Strategy.
pricing.access_inactive: Usajili ukiisha au malipo yakishindwa, historia ya utafutaji na kadi za fursa hufichwa — zinafunguka mara malipo yanapokamilika.
pricing.access_map: Ramani inaacha kuonyesha fursa na mipango ya hatua haipatikani bila usajili unaofanya kazi.
pricing.access_reactivate: Malipo yanarejesha mara moja data na vipengele vyako vyote.
pricing.trial_note: Malipo salama kupitia Stripe. Ghairi wakati wowote.

account.title: Akaunti Yangu
account.upgrade_desc: Mipango ya biashara ya AI, Ugunduzi wa Fursa, mtandao wa washawishi na zaidi.

reports.title: Ripoti za biashara
reports.subtitle: Uchambuzi wa fursa nchi kwa nchi kulingana na data halisi ya biashara.
reports.empty_desc: Data inapakiwa kutoka vyanzo vya biashara vya kimataifa

influencer.title: Nafasi ya Mshawishi
influencer.subtitle: Chagua ofa, shiriki viungo vyako vya kipekee, pata kamisheni.
influencer.no_links: Hakuna viungo hai. Pata kiungo chako cha kwanza katika kichupo cha Ofa.
influencer.create_profile_desc: Pata ofa za ushirika, unda viungo vinavyofuatiliwa na upate kamisheni kiotomatiki. Ufikiaji ni bure — jukwaa huhifadhi 30% ya kamisheni zinazoundwa.

seller.title: Nafasi ya Muuzaji
seller.subtitle: Unda ofa za ushirika. Washawishi wa jukwaa watazitangaza kwa hadhira yao.
seller.no_offers_free: Hakuna ofa zilizoundwa. Bofya + Ofa mpya kuanza.
seller.no_offers_locked: Boresha hadi mpango wa Strategy kuunda ofa za ushirika.
seller.paywall_desc: Kuunda ofa za ushirika kunapatikana kuanzia mpango wa Strategy (€99/mwezi).
seller.split_note: Jukwaa huhifadhi 30% ya kamisheni. 70% iliyobaki hulipwa kiotomatiki kwa washawishi kupitia Stripe Connect (S+7 baada ya ubadilishaji kuthibitishwa).

gemini.title: Gemini AI
gemini.subtitle: Gemini 2.0 Flash · Google
gemini.welcome_desc: Uliza chochote — uchambuzi wa soko, mkakati wa biashara, fursa za uagizaji/usafirishaji, au mada za jumla.
gemini.error: Kosa la muunganisho — angalia ufunguo wa API wa Gemini.
suggestions: Masoko gani yana matumaini zaidi kwa kilimo-chakula barani Afrika?
Jinsi ya kutathmini uwezo wa soko jipya la usafirishaji?

home.badge: Jukwaa la SaaS · Data ya uagizaji/usafirishaji duniani
home.hero_desc: Feel The Gap inachambua mtiririko wa biashara duniani kutambua masoko yenye uhaba wa ugavi. AI, data halisi, mipango ya biashara inayotekelezeka.
home.features_title: Kutoka data mbichi hadi fursa zinazotekelezeka
home.f1_title: Ramani ya mtiririko wa biashara duniani
home.f1_desc: Onyesha mapengo ya uagizaji/usafirishaji nchi kwa nchi. Tambua mahali ambapo mahitaji yanazidi ugavi wa ndani.
home.f2_desc: Changanua bidhaa yako. AI inatambua wasifu wa wateja, maeneo na njia za usambazaji.
home.f3_desc: Kutoka wazo hadi mpango wa hatua. Capex, Opex, ROI, wasambazaji — yote yanatengenezwa na AI katika sekunde.
home.f4_desc: Unganisha bidhaa zako na washawishi bora. Viungo vya ushirika vinavyofuatiliwa, malipo ya kiotomatiki kupitia Stripe.
home.cta_final_title: Uko tayari kutafuta soko lako linalofuata?
home.cta_final_desc: Usajili wa bure. Hakuna kadi ya mkopo inayohitajika.

marketplace_page.hero_title: Sell your production. Find your buyer. At market price.
marketplace_page.hero_pitch: Declare your volumes or post your demand — AI matches signals (quality, certifications, price, incoterm, lead time) and proposes the best pairs. Platform commission: 2.5% of matched GMV.
marketplace_page.volumes_empty: No open volume yet. Be the first to declare.

account_page.subscription_intro: Manage your subscription, view invoices or cancel from the billing portal.
account_page.biometric_desc: Enable fingerprint or Face ID for instant login.

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.intro: Track your selected opportunities, product sheets, and funding or investment dossiers in one place.
dashboard.block_opps_hint: Quick access to each opportunity's full synthesis.
dashboard.empty_opps_desc: Pick opportunities on a country report to see them here with one-click access to their synthesis.
dashboard.block_products_hint: Complete your product sheets to unlock matching and outreach.
dashboard.empty_products_desc: Create one product sheet per product you plan to sell, so buyers and matching can surface them.
dashboard.block_funding_hint: Credit, loans, guarantees — dossiers shown to financiers once complete.
dashboard.empty_funding_desc: Start a financing dossier to request credit from banks, crowdlenders or debt family offices.
dashboard.block_investment_hint: Equity, business angels, VC — opened to investors when the dossier is complete.
dashboard.empty_investment_desc: Start an investment dossier to attract equity capital — it's shown to investors once complete.
